transcript.original_message:
Namaste 🙏
Welcome to the divine journey of Maa Umiya at the Vishv Umiya Foundation.
Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, creating a better and brighter future for all.
"Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. We truly value your time. May Maa Umiya bless you and your family. Have a wonderful day."

transcript.message: Okay, so what are the goals and missions of the Viswamya Foundation?

The Vishv Umiya Foundation is dedicated to spiritual growth, social upliftment, and community harmony.It works to empower lives through education, healthcare, and humanitarian service.At its heart, the foundation builds Umiya Dham as a global center of peace, faith, and cultural unity.Would you like to know how you can be part of this sacred mission?
Yes, what are the sacred missions of the Vishwamya Foundation?

The sacred mission of the Vishv Umiya Foundation is to spread love, unity, and devotion through Maa Umiya’s divine presence.It supports education, healthcare, and community service to uplift every soul.It also builds Umiya Dham as a beacon of peace and spiritual strength for the world.Would you like to explore how you can connect with this divine journey?
Okay, thank you.
You're very welcome 🙏May Maa Umiya bless you with peace and joy.Feel free to visit our website anytime to...
transcript.original_message: You're very welcome 🙏May Maa Umiya bless you with peace and joy.Feel free to visit our website anytime to learn more.Have a beautiful day ahead.

transcript.original_message:
Namaste 
I am calling from Vishv Umiya Foundation. Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Would you be willing to hear a brief message about Maa Umiya and our mission?

Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, creating a better and brighter future for all.
"Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. We truly value your time. May Maa Umiya bless you and your family. Have a wonderful day."

transcript.original_message: Thank you for your time. Maa Umiya bless you and your family. Have a peaceful day. Jai Maa Umiya 🙏

transcriptSnippet: The conversation began with the agent from Vishv Umiya Foundation introducing itself and offering information about Maa Umiya and their mission in English, Hindi, or Gujarati. After a brief misunderstanding where the user inquired about an accident, the user confirmed interest in the message and chose Gujarati. The agent then explained about Umiya Dham and the Foundation's work. The user expressed a desire to join the team, provided their name (Arunankit Patel) and contact number (884819792), and the agent confirmed that their team would follow up.

transcript.message:
Namaste 
I am calling from Vishv Umiya Foundation. Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Would you be willing to hear a brief message about Maa Umiya and our mission?

Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultur...
transcript.original_message:
Namaste 
I am calling from Vishv Umiya Foundation. Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Would you be willing to hear a brief message about Maa Umiya and our mission?

Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, creating a better and brighter future for all.
"Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. We truly value your time. May Maa Umiya bless you and your family. Have a wonderful day."

transcript.message: Hello.

transcript.original_message: Namaste. Which language would you prefer—English, Hindi, or

transcript.message: ખુશીથી વાતે.હમ્મ.

transcript.original_message: ખુશીથી વાત કરવા માટે આભાર. શું તમે માદા ઉ

transcript.message: એકસીડન્ટ ક્યાં માં થયું?એકસીડન્ટ ક્યાં માં થયું? એકસ
માફ કરશો, હું અકસ્માત સંબંધિત માહિતી આપી શકતો નથી. શું તમે વિશ્વ ઉમિયા ફાઉન્ડેશન અને મા ઉમિયાની સંક્ષિપ્ત જાણકારી સાંભળવા ઇચ્છો છો?
Yes.
Thank you 🙏 Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Gujarati.

Thank you 🙏 

Umiya Dham વિશ્વમાં સૌથી ઊંચા મંદિરોમાંનું એક તરીકે વિકસિત થઈ રહ્યું છે, જે વિશ્વાસ, એકતા અને ભક્તિનું પ્રતીક છે. 

Vishv Umiya Foundation આધ્યાત્મિકતા, શિક્ષણ, આરોગ્ય અને સમુદાય upliftment દ્વારા સમાજને સેવા આપે છે. 

શું તમે વધુ જાણવું ઇચ્છો છો અથવા અમારી ટીમ સાથે જોડાવા માંગો છો?
હા, હું તમારી team સાથે જોડાવા માંગુ છું.

[sad] અદ્ભુત, હું તમને અમારી ટીમ સાથે જોડાવી શકું છું. કૃપા કરીને તમારો નામ અને સંપર્ક નંબર જણાવશો? 

[slow] અમે તમારી મદદ માટે તૈયાર છીએ. 

[happy] Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. May Maa Umiya bless you and your...

[sad] અદ્ભુત, હું તમને અમારી ટીમ સાથે જોડાવી શકું છું. કૃપા કરીને તમારો નામ અને સંપર્ક નંબર જણાવશો?

[happy] Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. May Maa Umiya bless you and your family. Jai Maa Umiya 🙏

અરુણાંકિત પટેલ છે.અને મારો phone number 884819792 છે.

Jai Maa Umiya 🙏

transcriptSnippet: The agent, representing Vishv Umiya Foundation, introduced their mission and the Umiya Dham project, offering language choices. The user selected Hindi and expressed interest in joining the foundation's team. The agent then requested the user's name and contact number to initiate the application process. The user provided their name, Deep Patel, and mobile number. The agent confirmed receipt of the details, assuring that their team would contact the user soon to explain the collaboration process. The conversation concluded with mutual thanks and devotional greetings.

[happy] बहुत अच्छा 🙏 आपके साथ जुड़ने के लिए बहुत खुशी हुई।[calm] हम आपको अपनी टीम से जोड़ देंगे, जो आपको विस्तार से बताएगी कि कैसे आप हमारे साथ सहयोग कर सकते हैं।[gentle] कृपया अपना नाम और संपर्क विवरण बताएं, ताकि हम आपके लिए आवेदन प्रक्रिया शुरू कर सकें।

[grateful] धन्यवाद दीप जी 🙏 आपका नाम और मोबाइल नंबर सफलतापूर्वक दर्ज कर लिया गया है।[calm] हमारी टीम जल्द ही आपके साथ संपर्क करेगी और आपको विस्तार से बताएगी कि कैसे आप हमारे साथ सहयोग कर सकते हैं।[peaceful] आपके समर्थन के लिए फिर से धन्यवाद। माँ उमिया आपकी रक्षा करें और आपके जीवन में शांति भरे। जय माँ उमिया 🙏
जय माँ अम्मिया।धन्यवाद।
[peaceful] जय माँ उमिया 🙏 आपका ...

transcriptSnippet: The conversation involves an agent from the Vishv Umiya Foundation reaching out to a user to share information about Maa Umiya and the foundation's mission. The user prefers to communicate in Hindi and expresses interest in learning more about the foundation and joining the team. The agent provides a brief overview of the foundation's focus on spirituality, education, health, and community upliftment, and mentions the development of Umiya Dham as a symbol of faith and unity. The user is directed to the foundation's website for further information and is assured that the team will contact them soon. The conversation concludes with the agent expressing gratitude and offering blessings.

transcript.message:
Namaste 
I am calling from Vishv Umiya Foundation. Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Would you be willing to hear a brief message about Maa Umiya and our mission?

Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, creating a better and brighter future for all.
"Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. We truly value your time. May Maa Umiya...
transcript.original_message:
Namaste 
I am calling from Vishv Umiya Foundation. Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Would you be willing to hear a brief message about Maa Umiya and our mission?

Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, creating a better and brighter future for all.
"Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. We truly value your time. May Maa Umiya bless you and your family. Have a wonderful day."

transcript.message: બસ, બસ, બસ.બસ.

transcript.original_message: [slow] Thank you for your time. Maa Umiya bless

transcript.message: वही बोल रहा है।हाँ? वही बोल रहा है। क्या बोल रहा है?

transcript.original_message: [slow] हाँ, मैं वही बोल रहा हूँ।क्या आप चाहते हैं कि मैं आपको विश्व उ

transcript.message: નહીં, તો મને રૂમ મળી જાય તો.હા. હા, હા.
[calm] સમજી ગયા, માફ કરશો. જો તમને રૂમ મળી જાય તો મને જણાવશો?

transcript.original_message: ... કૃપા કરીને મને જણાવો કે તમે હજુ સાંભળી રહ્યા છો?

transcript.message: Hello?

transcript.original_message: [soft] हाँ, मैं यहाँ हूँ। क्या आप ठीक हैं?

transcript.message: Hello?
[calm] हाँ, मैं यहाँ हूँ। क्या आप ठीक हैं?
हाँ, मग बात होऊंगा वो।हाँ।
[gentle] बिल्कुल, आपके साथ बात करने के लिए तैयार हूँ। कृपया बताएँ, क्या मदद चाहिए?
मदद कुछ नहीं चाहिए। मुझे यहाँ थोड़ी...
[soft] समझ गया। बस थोड़ी देर के लिए आराम कर रहे हैं, ठीक है। मैं यहीं हूँ अगर आपको कुछ चाहिए।
मुझे एक बार phone करना है।
[calm] बिल्कुल, आप जब चाहें, फोन कर सकते...
transcript.original_message: [calm] बिल्कुल, आप जब चाहें, फोन कर सकते हैं। मैं यहीं हूँ आपकी मदद के लिए।

transcript.message: Okay.Thank you.
[grateful] You're very welcome. May Maa Umiya bless you with peace and strength. Jai Maa Umiya 🙏
જો ગણી દે.

transcript.original_message: [calm] સમજી ગયા, હું ગણી દઈશ. કોઈ પણ સ

transcriptSnippet: The agent, representing Vishv Umiya Foundation, introduced its mission to the user, highlighting the development of Umiya Dham as a spiritual and social center. The user opted to communicate in Hindi and requested more information. The agent provided details about the foundation's work in education, healthcare, and rural development, sharing their website. Finally, the user asked to be connected with the team, which the agent confirmed before concluding the call.

transcript.message:
Namaste 
I am calling from Vishv Umiya Foundation. Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Would you be willing to hear a brief message about Maa Umiya and our mission?

Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, a...
transcript.original_message:
Namaste 
I am calling from Vishv Umiya Foundation. Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Would you be willing to hear a brief message about Maa Umiya and our mission?

Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, creating a better and brighter future for all.
"Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. We truly value your time. May Maa Umiya bless you and your family. Have a wonderful day."

transcript.message: હા, હિન્દી.
धन्यवाद 🙏आप किस भाषा में सुनना पसंद करेंगे — हिंदी, अंग्रेजी, या गुजराती?क्या आप एक संक्षिप्त संदेश...
transcript.original_message: धन्यवाद 🙏आप किस भाषा में सुनना पसंद करेंगे — हिंदी, अंग्रेजी, या गुजराती?क्या आप एक संक्षिप्त संदेश सुनना चाहेंगे, जो माँ उमिया और विश्व उमिया फाउंडेशन के बारे में है?

transcript.message: धन्यवाद 🙏उमिया धाम दुनिया के सबसे ऊंचे मंदिरों में से एक के रूप में विकसित किया जा रहा है, जो आस्था, एकता और भक्ति का प्रतीक है।विश्व उमिया फाउंडेशन सामाजिक कल्याण, शिक्षा, स्वास्थ्य और आध्यात्मिक विकास के माध्यम से समाज की सेवा करता है।क्या आप अधिक जानकारी चाहेंगे या हमारी टीम से जुड़ना चाहेंगे?
हाँ, मैं अधिक जानकारी चाह-- अ, लेना चाहता हूँ।

वाह बहुत अच्छा 🙏 आपको अधिक जानकारी चाहिए, तो बताता हूँ — उमिया धाम एक ऐतिहासिक और आध्यात्मिक केंद्र के रूप में विकसित किया जा रहा है, जो भारत के अहमदाबाद में स्थित है। यह न केवल एक मंदिर है, बल्कि एक विशाल सामाजिक और आध्यात्मिक केंद्र है, जो शिक्षा, स्वास्थ्य सेवाएं, ग्रामीण विकास और युवा सशक्तिकरण में लगी हुई है।आप वेबसाइट पर जाकर अधिक जानकारी प्राप्त कर सकते हैं — https://www.vuf.org/क्या आप चाहेंगे कि मैं आपको हमारी टीम से जोड़ दूं?
हाँ, please आपकी टीम से जोड़ दीजिए।धन्यवाद।
वाह बहुत अच्छा 🙏 आपको हमारी टीम से जोड़ा जा रहा है।एक मिनट का इंतजार कीजिए, आपको तुरंत संपर्क किया जाएगा।धन्यवाद आपके समय के लिए।माँ उमिया आप और आपके परिवार को आशीर्वाद दे।शुभ दिन हो।जय माँ उमिया 🙏

transcriptSnippet:
The conversation began with the agent from Vishv Umiya Foundation introducing their mission and Umiya Dham, offering language choices. The user selected Gujarati and initially expressed interest in connecting with the team.

Subsequently, the user inquired about "Omnia Dam," which the agent clarified as "Umiya Dham." The agent then provided detailed information about Umiya Dham as one of the world's tallest temples, symbolizing faith, unity, and devotion, and its role as a center for spiritual growth, education, healthcare, and community service through the Vishv Umiya Foundation. The conversation concluded with the agent offering further information via their website.

The conversation concluded with the agent offering further information via their website.

I am calling from Vishv Umiya Foundation. Which language are you comfortable speaking — English, Hindi, or Gujarati?
Would you be willing to hear a brief message about Maa Umiya and our mission?

Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing strength, devotion, and cultural pride, and spreading a message of unity and spirituality.
At Vishv Umiya Foundation, the mission is to uplift society through spirituality, education, healthcare, and community service, creating a better and brighter future for all.
"Thank you for connecting with Vishv Umiya Foundation. We truly value your time. May Maa Umiya bless you and your family. Have a wonderful day."

transcript.message: No, about what is the Omnia Dam?

I believe you're referring to Umiya Dham, not Omnia Dam. Umiya Dham is being developed as one of the tallest temples in the world, symbolizing faith, unity, and devotion. It is a spiritual and cultural landmark being built by the Vishv Umiya Foundation in Ahmedabad. Would you like to know more about its vision or how it serves society?
Yes.

Umiya Dham is being built as a beacon of faith, unity, and cultural heritage, rising as one of the tallest temples in the world. It stands as a symbol of devotion, bringing people together across communities and generations. The temple will also serve as a center for spiritual growth, education, healthcare, and community service through the Vishv Umiya Foundation. Would you like to visit the website to learn more?
